first_run.rationale: The scores are identical (8/10), and the reasoning is substantively the same. Both evaluations correctly identify the candidate as a strong match based on 15+ years of experience, direct alignment of their current role (re:cinq, AI agents), and a strong testing culture. Both also correctly identify the same primary gaps: lack of Nest.js, Kotlin, and specific testing tools like Vitest. The minor differences in wording and emphasis are well within the bounds of normal run-to-run variation and are not linked to the change in location from Berlin to São Paulo.
